title: Coolrunner Non-Slip Cushion Pad, 8 PACK Strong Adhesive Sofa Tape, Hook Loop Sofa Cushion Grippers Keep Sofa Tidy For Reduce Couch Cushions Sliding (15 CM x 15 CM)
features: High-Quality Material: The sofa cushion gripper is made of nylon and paper. It consists of a hook side and loop side, is anti-slip, can be fixed on the sofa firmly, not easy to fall off.
Strong Self-Adhesive: The cushion pad has a strong stickiness, to keep the cushion in place and will not slide anymore, even if you jumps up and down on the sofa.
Portable Use: No need for other tools, just tear off the white release paper, and then stick it on the cushion, install easily and removed without leaving dirt.
Quantity & Size: Package includes 8PCS sofa tapes, size 10cm x 15cm/3.94in x 5.90in, and the size is cuttable and can be cut into any size your need.
Widely Used: Hook loop tape can use for the sofa, and chairs, widely applications in the living room, kitchen, outdoor sports, clothing, and shoes.
